title: The Birdcage Tightens
description: Pages 11–14 focus on the birdcage tightens, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Senor Pink, Doflamingo Family, Unknown person #5 as the Colosseum fighters choose to help Luffy, and the rebellion turns into a race to reach Doflamingo before the country is crushed.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: By the way, I've come here...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: To settle things with you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Who're you?! an enemy?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: No. A man, my dear boy.

dialogue.speaker: Senor Pink
dialogue.text: KyaA AA-7 Senorj

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: New Land formation Royal Palace

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Weird! Kya! Some- thing is off!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: Why're the idiots from the colosseum climbing up!

dialogue.speaker: Fujitora
dialogue.text: There should have been several thousand Marines down there! And vice Admiral Bastille!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Oi! Is this all the Donquixote family is made up of!?

dialogue.speaker: Fujitora
dialogue.text: Not to mention Marine HQ Admiral Fuji- Tora as well! How'd they get past all of them!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We'll be at the boss in no time!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: New Royal Plateau second level

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Report-ing in!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Straw hat Luffy has arrived on the first LE-...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Gomu Gomu No...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Buha-!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: GATLING GUN!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: We are absolutely helpless against them! What's more...

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: The colosseum army has showed up from below!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Straw hat!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: There they are, Derringer!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: The Marines are being held back, the entire lot of them!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Is there no way...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I can convince you to move out of the way?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Well...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The pirates of the straw hat crew and those warriors who currently aid them...

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: any and all who attempt to bring harm to these parties...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: shall not be allowed past this point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Is the support of pirates the job of the Revo- Lutionary Army?

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: Indeed it is. As a member of the revolutionary army, I shall not let you pass!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Actually, what I meant was...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: AS A BIG BROTHER!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Oh?

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: Sabo arrives on the scene!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: And exactly whose big brother might you be?

summary: The Birdcage Tightens develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Senor Pink, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
